ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully readable. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Scanned invoice, but text is clearly readable. Issued by J.UNGERTH AB.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-457486 does not constitute an LC reference.

occurrences_in_invoice_files.location: Header/issuer block - 'J.UNGERTH AB' appears as the invoice issuer at top left
Company branding top right - 'UNGERTH' in large header text with 'MARKNETING PAPER & BOARD'

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'J. UNGERTH AB' found multiple times in the invoice file.

criteria_met.detail: Certificate consignor 'J. UNGERTH AB' matches invoice issuer 'J.UNGERTH AB' (minor spacing difference: 'J. UNGERTH' vs 'J.UNGERTH').
Certificate consignee 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' cannot be identified in the invoice. Invoice buyer is 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs'.

pairing_validation.note: At least one criterion (consignor) is met. Pairing is valid. Proceed to full verification.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: J. UNGERTH AB, Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: J.UNGERTH AB, Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'J. UNGERTH AB' found in invoice as issuer 'J.UNGERTH AB'. The difference is only a period and spacing: 'J. UNGERTH' vs 'J.UNGERTH'. After normalization of extra spaces and punctuation, these are identical. Name found in invoice header, payment terms, and signature block.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignor country
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate states SWEDEN. Invoice states 'Sweden' in issuer address block. Also confirmed by IBAN prefix SE66 in payment terms and bank reference 'DABASESX'. Country match confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found expressly in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'J. UNGERTH AB' in Sweden. Invoice issuer is 'J.UNGERTH AB' at Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04 Göteborg, Sweden. The name difference is minimal (period after 'J' and space before 'UNGERTH'). After normalization of punctuation and spaces, the names are identical: 'j ungerth ab'. Address matches: Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04. City name difference (GOTHENBURG vs Göteborg) is the same city in English vs Swedish - this is an address detail, not a name issue. Country Sweden confirmed in both. MATCH per rule 4.1.0.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The period and spacing difference could indicate different legal entities
rejected_hypotheses.reason: After normalization of punctuation and spaces per section 4 (central normalization rules), 'J. UNGERTH AB' and 'J.UNGERTH AB' are identical. This is a formatting difference, not a substantive name difference.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'J. UNGERTH AB' kan identifieras i fakturan som fakturautställare 'J.UNGERTH AB'. Skillnaden är enbart punkt- och mellanslagsformatering. Adress Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04 matchar. Land Sverige bekräftas i fakturans adressblock och IBAN-prefix SE. MATCH.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD, INDUSTRIAL VALLEY PHASE 3, JAWDA ST., KAEC 23987-4281, Saudi Arabia
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Buyer: RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs, Km 22, Route de Rufisque, Rufisque, Senegal

comparison_steps.description: Check Buyer/Invoice-To field for consignee
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Buyer field contains 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs' in Senegal. Certificate consignee is 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' in Saudi Arabia. These are entirely different companies in different countries.

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignee in secondary fields
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice does not contain a separate 'Ship To' or 'Delivery Address' field. No mention of 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY' anywhere in the invoice. Port of Discharge is 'Dakar' (Senegal), not Saudi Arabia.

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignee name anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Searched entire invoice text for 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY' or 'CPI'. The string 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY' does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The abbreviation 'CPI' does not appear in the invoice either.

comparison_steps.description: Attempt to match via normalization rules
comparison_steps.detail: The names 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' and 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs' share no common words or identifiers. No normalization can bridge this difference.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country vs invoice buyer country
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: Saudi Arabia. Invoice buyer: Senegal. Countries do not match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - Buyer field checked first
Koncernstruktur - consignee name not found anywhere in invoice
Country check - Saudi Arabia vs Senegal

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' in Saudi Arabia. The invoice's only buyer/addressee is 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs' in Senegal. These are completely different companies in different countries. There is no Ship-To field, no Delivery Address, and no other field in the invoice that mentions 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY' or any variation thereof. The Port of Discharge is Dakar (Senegal), further confirming the goods are destined for Senegal, not Saudi Arabia. The consignee cannot be verified. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY could be a related party to RUFSAC
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.1.3.1, the system may not assume konzern relations, agent relations, or trading relationships. The names share no common words. The countries are different (Saudi Arabia vs Senegal). There is no evidence of any relationship between these entities in the documents.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate and invoice may refer to different shipments/transactions
rejected_hypotheses.reason: This supports the MISMATCH conclusion. The certificate refers to a consignee in Saudi Arabia while the invoice is for a buyer in Senegal with goods being shipped to Dakar.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' i Saudiarabien kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs' i Senegal. Dessa är helt olika företag i olika länder. Inget fält i fakturan nämner certifikatets mottagare. MISMATCH.

checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Fully Extensible Hi Porosity Sack Kraft Paper / Quality: Sack Kraft Paper

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.detail: No article numbers in the certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate main designation: 'SACK KRAFT PAPER'. Invoice contains 'Sack Kraft Paper' both in the description ('Fully Extensible Hi Porosity Sack Kraft Paper') and in the Quality column ('Sack Kraft Paper'). The identity-bearing main designation 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' is found in the invoice. The word 'UNBLEACHED' in the certificate is a qualifier/attribute, not the core product name. '(HP)' likely stands for 'Hi Porosity' which appears in the invoice description. These are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' found in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions - 'UNBLEACHED' and '(HP)' are qualifiers that do not change product identity

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description is 'UNBLEACHED SACK KRAFT PAPER (HP)'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'SACK KRAFT PAPER'. This exact string appears in the invoice in both the description line ('Fully Extensible Hi Porosity Sack Kraft Paper') and the Quality column ('Sack Kraft Paper'). 'UNBLEACHED' is a product attribute/qualifier. '(HP)' appears to correspond to 'Hi Porosity' in the invoice description - these are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4 that do not change the product identity. The invoice additionally specifies 'Fully Extensible' which is further product specification - additional information in the invoice does not cause MISMATCH per section 2.1. The core product 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' is clearly identifiable in both documents. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: UNBLEACHED is a critical product differentiator that must appear in the invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.3.4, additions before or after the identity-bearing main designation do not cause MISMATCH when the main designation can be exactly identified. 'UNBLEACHED' is a quality descriptor, and the invoice's 'Fully Extensible Hi Porosity' describes the same type of sack kraft paper. Per section 2.1, the verification is one-sided - additional information in the invoice is not a basis for MISMATCH.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' kan identifieras exakt i fakturan både i varubeskrivningen och kvalitetskolumnen. 'UNBLEACHED' och '(HP)' är kvalificerande tillägg som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '551,940MT net' - this is the verification-basis quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 value: 551,940MT net. This must be interpreted as 551.940 MT net weight (comma as thousands separator based on European convention and the magnitude being reasonable for 516 reels of paper). Alternatively: 551,940 MT (551 thousand 940 metric tons) which would be unreasonable for paper reels. Interpretation: 551.940 MT net.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Direct identification of 551.940 MT in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 551.940 in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice quantity column shows 297,076 mt. Invoice does not contain the value 551.940 or 551940 anywhere. The value 297.076 mt does not match 551.940 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Check if multiple invoices are present
comparison_steps.detail: Only one invoice is present in the document pair.

comparison_steps.description: Check if unit conversion resolves the discrepancy
comparison_steps.detail: Both certificate and invoice use MT. No unit conversion needed. The numeric values differ: 551.940 vs 297.076.

comparison_steps.description: Check if unit weight derivation applies
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not state weight per piece.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate total can be derived from summing invoice rows
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has only one product row showing 297,076 mt. No summation possible to reach 551.940.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.6 - Exception 3E (Sum of row weights without total row)
comparison_steps.description: Check if row weights can be summed
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice has only one row. Same value 297,076 mt. Cannot reach 551.940.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3.1 - Multiple quantity entries - check 516 REELS vs 275 Reels
comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 6 states 516 REELS. Invoice states 275 Reels.
comparison_steps.detail: 516 ≠ 275. The reels count in the certificate (516) does not match the invoice (275). This is an explicit contradiction per 4.4.3.1.

comparison_steps.description: Both quantity measures show significant discrepancy
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 551.940 MT net, 516 reels. Invoice: 297.076 mt, 275 reels. Neither value matches. The differences are approximately 86% and 88% respectively - far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. Both the weight and reel count in the invoice are roughly half of the certificate values, suggesting the invoice covers only a partial shipment.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value is the verification basis: 551,940MT net
Direct identification - 551.940 MT not found in invoice

Multiple quantities - both certificate quantities checked. Neither matches invoice. Invoice value 297,076 mt explicitly contradicts certificate 551,940 MT. Invoice 275 reels explicitly contradicts certificate 516 reels.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '551,940MT net'. Interpreting the comma as a decimal separator (European convention), this is 551.940 MT net weight. Invoice quantity is 297,076 mt (interpreting similarly: 297.076 MT). These values differ by 254.864 MT (approximately 86% discrepancy), far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. Certificate Box 6 states 516 REELS, invoice states 275 Reels - also a large discrepancy. The invoice appears to cover approximately half of the certificate's quantities, suggesting the invoice is for a partial shipment or the wrong invoice. Per 4.4.3.1, the invoice explicitly contains quantities (297.076 mt and 275 reels) that contradict the certificate's quantities (551.940 MT and 516 reels). Both quantities are explicitly stated in both documents with the same units, and neither matches. MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 551,940 could mean 551,940 (five hundred fifty-one thousand nine hundred forty) MT if comma is thousands separator
rejected_hypotheses.reason: 551,940 MT would be over half a million metric tons, which is unreasonable for paper reels. The European decimal convention (551.940 MT ≈ 552 MT) is the only reasonable interpretation for 516 reels of paper.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice might be one of multiple invoices covering the shipment
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Only one invoice is provided in the document pair. Exception 3A requires multiple invoices to be present. Even if this were the case, the certificate does not reference multiple invoices.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 4.4.6.1 could apply since the values are 'partially' present
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.4.6.1 applies when the invoice COMPLETELY LACKS a quantity/weight entry. Here, the invoice explicitly states 297,076 mt and 275 reels - it has quantity information, but the values differ from the certificate. This is an explicit contradiction, not an absence of information. MISMATCH, not MANUAL_REVIEW.

checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 551,940MT net (box 7) och 516 REELS (box 6) kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 297,076 mt och 275 Reels — båda värdena skiljer sig markant från certifikatets uppgifter och utgör uttryckliga motsägelser. Inget undantag (3A–3E) är tillämpligt. MISMATCH.

checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Sweden Origin (in description); 'goods are of Sweden origin' (certification statement)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains two explicit origin statements: (1) In Description of Goods: 'Sweden Origin' and (2) In certification statement at bottom: 'We certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Sweden origin.'

comparison_steps.description: Compare 'SWEDEN' with 'Sweden'
comparison_steps.detail: After case normalization: 'sweden' = 'sweden'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via explicit origin statement
Positive verification - origin Sweden expressly identified in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'SWEDEN' as country of origin. Invoice contains 'Sweden Origin' in the goods description line and 'the goods are of Sweden origin' in the certification statement at the bottom. Both are explicit origin statements per rule 4.5.1. After case normalization, SWEDEN = Sweden. MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' kan uttryckligen identifieras i fakturan både i varubeskrivningen ('Sweden Origin') och i certifieringsuttalandet ('the goods are of Sweden origin'). MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Consignor 'J. UNGERTH AB' identified in invoice as issuer. At least one criterion met. Pairing valid.
Consignor name found as invoice issuer.
Buyer is RUFSAC in Senegal, not CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY in Saudi Arabia.
CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY not found anywhere in invoice.
SACK KRAFT PAPER identified in invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct identification of quantity in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 551.940 MT not found in invoice. Invoice shows 297.076 mt.
Certificate 551.940 MT vs invoice 297.076 mt = explicit contradiction. Certificate 516 reels vs invoice 275 reels = explicit contradiction.
Certificate does not state weight per piece.
Sweden Origin found in description and certification statement.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser sannolikt olika leveranser eller mottagare. Certifikatets mottagare är 'Cement Products Industry Co.Ltd' i Saudiarabien, medan fakturan är ställd till 'RUFSAC' i Senegal — helt olika företag i olika länder. Dessutom anger certifikatet 551,940 MT netto och 516 rullar, medan fakturan anger 297,076 MT och 275 rullar, vilket tyder på att fakturan täcker ungefär hälften av certifikatets kvantitet.

summary_of_mismatches.description: Certificate consignee 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' (Saudi Arabia) cannot be identified in the invoice. Invoice buyer is 'RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs' (Senegal). Completely different entities in different countries.
Certificate states 551,940MT net and 516 REELS. Invoice states 297,076 mt and 275 Reels. Both values explicitly contradict the certificate (approximately 86% discrepancy).

consistency_check.note: Two checkpoints have MISMATCH status (consignee and quantity). comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL, which is consistent with having at least one MISMATCH.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: J. UNGERTH AB, Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: J.UNGERTH AB, Lilla Bommen 2, SE-411 04 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) - consignor name found as invoice issuer. Spacing/punctuation normalization applied.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'J. UNGERTH AB' identifieras som fakturautställare 'J.UNGERTH AB'. Namnfällen skiljer sig enbart i punkt/mellanslag-formatering. Adress och land (Sverige) matchar.

sections.certificate_value: CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD, INDUSTRIAL VALLEY PHASE 3, JAWDA ST., KAEC 23987-4281, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Buyer: RUFSAC - Société Rufisquoise de Fabrication de Sacs, Km 22, Route de Rufisque, Rufisque, Senegal
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält identifierat (4.2.0.2). Consignee-namn inte funnet i fakturan (4.2.0.1). Landkontroll: Saudiarabien ≠ Senegal (4.2.3).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'CEMENT PRODUCTS INDUSTRY CO.LTD' i Saudiarabien kan inte identifieras någonstans i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är ett helt annat företag ('RUFSAC') i ett annat land (Senegal). MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Fully Extensible Hi Porosity Sack Kraft Paper / Quality: Sack Kraft Paper
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3). Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' identifierad i fakturan. Tillägg behandlade som icke-identitetsbärande (4.3.4).
sections.motivation: Kärnprodukten 'SACK KRAFT PAPER' identifieras exakt i fakturan. 'UNBLEACHED' och '(HP)' är produktegenskaper som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1). Box 7 är verifieringsgrund (4.4.2.1). Uttrycklig motsägelse (4.4.3.1). Samtliga undantag 3A–3E prövade och ej tillämpliga.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 551,940 MT netto och 516 rullar. Fakturan anger 297,076 MT och 275 rullar. Både vikt och antal rullar i fakturan avviker markant från certifikatet (ca 86% diskrepans). Uttrycklig motsägelse. MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Sweden Origin; 'the goods are of Sweden origin'
sections.rule_applied: Ursprungsland identifierat via explicit origin-uttalande (4.5.1). Versalnormalisering tillämpad (4.5.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'SWEDEN' identifieras uttryckligen i fakturan genom 'Sweden Origin' i varubeskrivningen och certifieringsuttalandet. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: Two MISMATCH checkpoints (consignee and quantity) correctly result in NOT_IDENTICAL overall. All motivations are consistent with their respective status values.
